document.name: Hard Rock Cafe Budapest
document.shortDescription: Rock-themed restaurant and bar by Erzsébet tér — live sets, memorabilia, and late cocktails near Váci utca.
document.longDescription:
Hard Rock Cafe Budapest sits at Erzsébet tér 12-14, steps from Deák Ferenc tér and the Váci pedestrian zone. Expect American grill fare, signature cocktails, and periodic live music in a memorabilia-filled dining room. Reservations and events are listed on the official site.

Sources: https://cafe.hardrock.com/budapest/

document.name: LÄRM
document.shortDescription: Underground electronic club near Deák — techno and house until morning in a raw basement space.
document.longDescription:
LÄRM on Kossuth Lajos utca is a basement club known for techno, house, and guest DJs within walking distance of Deák Ferenc tér. Weekend nights run late with a focused dance-floor policy. Check larm.hu for line-ups and entry rules.

Sources: https://www.larm.hu/

document.name: Legenda Boat Party
document.address: 1051 Budapest, Vigadó tér, Danube pier, Hungary
document.shortDescription: Danube party cruises departing near the Parliament — DJs, bars, and skyline views from the river.
document.longDescription:
Legenda Boat Party runs evening cruises on the Danube with DJs and open bars, boarding near Vigadó tér facing Parliament. Summer schedules add weekend sailings past the illuminated facade. Packages and boarding times are on legendaboatparty.com.

Sources: https://www.legendaboatparty.com/

document.name: Spoon Cafe & Lounge
document.shortDescription: Moored restaurant ship on the Danube — dinners, DJs, and party nights on the promenade pier.
document.longDescription:
Spoon Cafe & Lounge is a restaurant boat docked at Vigadó utca with year-round dining and weekend party events. The deck looks directly onto the Danube Promenade and Chain Bridge views. Program and reservations are on spoon.hu.

Sources: https://www.spoon.hu/

document.name: 360 Bar
document.shortDescription: Rooftop cocktails on Andrássy út — skyline igloos in winter and open-air DJ sunsets.
document.longDescription:
360 Bar crowns Andrássy út 39 with panoramic Pest views, craft cocktails, and seasonal igloo domes. Weekend hours extend past midnight with reservation-friendly seating. Details and events are listed on 360bar.hu.

Sources: https://www.360bar.hu/

document.name: High Note SkyBar
document.shortDescription: Rooftop bar behind the Basilica — DJs, spritzes, and dome views a short walk from the Opera.
document.longDescription:
High Note SkyBar on Hercegprímás utca offers rooftop cocktails with St. Stephen's Basilica backdrop, minutes from the Opera house. Weekend DJ sets and lounge seating fill the terrace season. Book tables on highnoteskybar.hu.

Sources: https://www.highnoteskybar.hu/

document.name: Instant-Fogas
document.shortDescription: Legendary ruin-bar complex — multiple dance floors and courtyards behind Király utca.
document.longDescription:
Instant-Fogas spans courtyards and rooms at Akácfa utca 49-51, anchoring Király utca's ruin-bar strip. Expect eclectic décor, themed rooms, and DJs until dawn on weekends. Entry rules and events are on instant.co.hu.

Sources: https://instant.co.hu/

document.name: Beckett's Irish Pub
document.shortDescription: Irish pub on Liszt Ferenc tér — live bands, sports screens, and late pints on the restaurant row.
document.longDescription:
Beckett's anchors Liszt Ferenc tér with Guinness taps, pub food, and weekend live music facing the pedestrian restaurant strip. Football screenings and DJ nights keep the room busy after theatre shows. Details on becketts.hu.

Sources: https://www.becketts.hu/

document.name: Blue Bird Bar
document.shortDescription: Cocktail bar in Gozsdu Udvar — spritzes, DJs, and late nights in the passage courtyards.
document.longDescription:
Blue Bird Bar sits inside the Gozsdu Udvar arcade with craft cocktails and weekend DJs steps from Dob utca. The ruin-style interior opens to the connected courtyards for bar-hopping. Menu on bluebirdbar.hu.

Sources: https://www.bluebirdbar.hu/

document.name: Morrison's Lit
document.shortDescription: Compact party bar on Wesselényi utca — DJs and dance nights from the Morrison's group.
document.longDescription:
Morrison's Lit on Wesselényi utca delivers focused DJ nights and themed parties in a smaller footprint than the group's larger clubs. It bridges the Jewish Quarter and inner Erzsébetváros bar scene. Updates on morrisons.hu.

Sources: https://www.morrisons.hu/

document.shortDescription: Boulevard bar near Rákóczi tér — cocktails, DJs, and late weekends on Erzsébet körút.

document.name: A38 Ship
document.address: 1111 Budapest, Petőfi híd, budai hídfő, Hungary
document.shortDescription: Concert ship beside Petőfi bridge — live bands and club nights on the Danube by the university bank.
document.longDescription:
A38 is a converted Ukrainian stone-carrier moored at Petőfi bridge with multiple decks for concerts and DJ parties. It won 'best bar in the world' polls and remains essential for riverside nightlife near Műegyetem. Tickets on a38.hu.

Sources: https://www.a38.hu/en

document.name: Légió Hungarian Pub
document.shortDescription: Underground pub by Ferenciek tere — Hungarian craft taps, live folk-rock, and late snacks.
document.longDescription:
Légió on Pipa utca is a cellar pub with Hungarian microbrews and weekend live bands near Ferenciek tere. The vibe is local and loud, bridging Nagytemplom utca and the riverside. Updates on legio.hu.

Sources: https://www.legio.hu/

document.name: Spíler Bálna
document.shortDescription: Party restaurant on the Bálna terrace — DJs, spritzes, and Danube views at Boráros tér.
document.longDescription:
Spíler Bálna occupies the Bálna center with terrace parties overlooking the Danube near Boráros tér. Weekends bring DJs and cocktail service alongside the Spíler kitchen. Book on spilerbalna.hu.

document.name: Nehru Part Beach Bar
document.shortDescription: Seasonal beach bar on the Pest Danube bank — sunsets, DJs, and sand volleyball in Millennium Park.
document.longDescription:
Nehru Part brings sand, loungers, and DJ parties to the Danube embankment in the Millennium City Centre each summer. The bar faces the river with cocktail service and weekend events. Season info on nehrupart.hu.

Sources: https://www.nehrupart.hu/

document.name: Robertson Bar
document.shortDescription: Castle Hill cocktail bar — DJs and mixed drinks in vaulted rooms on Robertson utca.
document.longDescription:

document.name: Rudas Rooftop Bar
document.shortDescription: Rooftop hot tub bar at Rudas Bath — cocktails and Danube panoramas on Gellért Hill.
document.longDescription:
Rudas Bath's rooftop wellness bar combines thermal pools with cocktails overlooking the Danube from Gellért Hill. Friday and Saturday night sessions include DJ sets in summer. Packages on rudasfurdo.hu.

document.name: Tabán Terrace
document.address: 1013 Budapest, Apáczai Csere János utca 1, Hungary
document.shortDescription: Riverside terrace bar in Tabán — DJs and spritzes facing the Parliament across the Danube.
document.longDescription:
Tabán Terrace overlooks the Danube from Apáczai Csere János utca with weekend DJs and cocktail service. The Buda embankment location suits sunset sessions before crossing to Pest clubs. Events on tabanterrace.hu.

Sources: https://www.tabanterrace.hu/

document.name: Nappali Buda
document.shortDescription: Garden party bar on Rózsadomb — DJs and cocktails in a villa yard on Széher út.
document.longDescription:
Nappali Buda turns a Rózsadomb villa garden into weekend DJ parties with craft cocktails away from the Pest ruin-bar crush. The residential hill location draws locals for sunset sets. Info on nappali.hu.

Sources: https://www.nappali.hu/

document.name: Gellért Lobby Bar
document.shortDescription: Hotel bar nights at Gellért — jazz, cocktails, and late service in art-nouveau salons.
document.longDescription:
The Gellért Hotel lobby bar hosts piano jazz and cocktail service under the famous glass dome at Szent Gellért tér. Dress smart for weekend nights after spa visits. Program on danubiusgellert.com.

Sources: https://www.danubiusgellert.com/bars

document.name: Budapest Park Club Nights
document.shortDescription: Island dance nights at Budapest Park — electronic headliners and after-midnight terraces.
document.longDescription:
Budapest Park's club nights bring international DJs to Óbuda Island with multiple bars and outdoor dance floors. Events run past midnight on summer weekends with tram access from Pest. Line-up on budapestpark.hu.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/en/parties

document.name: Kiscelli Pub District
document.shortDescription: Hillside pub quarter near Aquincum — cellar bars and live folk nights on Kiscelli út.
document.longDescription:
The Kiscelli út pub strip above Aquincum mixes museum culture with weekend bar crawls in former monastery cellars. Live folk and rock bands play small rooms frequented by Óbuda locals. Museum info on kiscellimuzeum.hu.

Sources: https://www.kiscellimuzeum.hu/

document.name: Galiba Garden
document.shortDescription: Garden ruin bar near Kolosy — craft beer, DJs, and fire pits in Óbuda hills.
document.longDescription:
Galiba Garden on Frankel Leó út is an outdoor ruin-style bar with DJ weekends and craft taps above Kolosy tér. String lights and picnic tables draw Buda residents away from Pest clubs. Events on galibagarden.hu.

Sources: https://www.galibagarden.hu/

document.name: Zsindelyes Music Pub
document.shortDescription: Live-rock pub by Main Square — Hungarian bands and beer in a Óbuda institution.
document.longDescription:
Zsindelyes on Lajos utca has hosted rock gigs and pints near Main Square Óbuda for decades. Weekend cover bands pack the long bar room. Gig list on zsindelyes.hu.

Sources: https://www.zsindelyes.hu/
